languages.text: "Я отдам тебе то, за чем охотится Калькасар, в обмен на твою помощь".
"I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."
languages.original_text: "Я отдам тебе то, за чем охотится Калькасар, в обмен на твою помощь".

traits.locale_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."
"I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."
"I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

languages.text: «Le entregaré lo que sea que busca Calcazar a cambio de su ayuda».
languages.original_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

traits.locale_text: «Le entregaré lo que sea que busca Calcazar a cambio de su ayuda».

languages.text: “只要你帮我，我愿意把卡尔卡扎在找的东西给你。”
languages.original_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

traits.locale_text: “只要你帮我，我愿意把卡尔卡扎在找的东西给你。”

languages.text: « J'accepte de vous donner ce que Calcazar cherche en échange de votre aide. »
languages.original_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

traits.locale_text: « J'accepte de vous donner ce que Calcazar cherche en échange de votre aide. »

languages.text: "Yardımın karşılığında sana Calcazar'ın peşinde olduğu şeyi vereceğim."
languages.original_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

traits.locale_text: "Yardımın karşılığında sana Calcazar'ın peşinde olduğu şeyi vereceğim."

languages.text: "Ich gebe Euch, was Calcazar will, wenn Ihr mir dafür helft."
languages.original_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe Euch, was Calcazar will, wenn Ihr mir dafür helft."

languages.text: 「カルカザールの求めるものを、君の助けと引き換えに与える」
languages.original_text: "I will give you what Calcazar is after in exchange for your help."

traits.locale_text: 「カルカザールの求めるものを、君の助けと引き換えに与える」
